# Stage 1 — Build the wiki site
FROM squidfunk/mkdocs-material:9.7.6 AS builder
ENV NO_MKDOCS_2_WARNING=1


WORKDIR /build

# Install wiki dependencies
COPY requirements.shared.txt requirements.wiki.txt ./

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip && \
    pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.wiki.txt

# Copy wiki content and MkDocs config
COPY wiki/docs docs/
COPY wiki/mkdocs.yml mkdocs.yml
COPY wiki/main.py main.py

# Build the static site
RUN mkdocs build --strict --site-dir /site

# Stage 2 — Serve with nginx
FROM nginx:1.29-alpine

# Remove default nginx page
RUN rm -rf /usr/share/nginx/html/*

# Copy built site from builder
COPY --from=builder /site /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy custom nginx config
COPY nginx-wiki.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

HEALTHCHECK --interval=5m --timeout=5s --start-period=30s --retries=5 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost/ || exit 1

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
